value.found_quote: Agent Development Kit (ADK) provides distributed tracing capabilities to help you visualize the end-to-end journey of a request as it travels through your agent's architecture... ADK emits data using the standard OTLP format, ensuring that your traces will seamlessly integrate into any OTel-compatible backend (e.g., Google Cloud Trace, Jaeger, Grafana Tempo, Datadog).
value.rationale: The page explicitly confirms all aspects of the claim: (1) ADK provides distributed tracing, (2) it visualizes the end-to-end journey of a request through an agent's architecture, (3) it exports to OTLP-compatible backends, and (4) it supports Google Cloud Trace. The page also notes it is supported in ADK Python v1.17.0, Go v1.0.0, and Kotlin v0.1.0, indicating active/generally available status.
